label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked with 1km to go on the 20% wall finish in Valdepenas, gapping MASS and entire field for stage win.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC used SEPP domestique to launch final attack on 20% wall, exploiting positioning over pure climbing power.
NIELSEN Magnus broke at 16km remaining before final climb, tactical error going too early for wall finish.
MASS Enric had VAN BAAL Dylan pull through final 4km despite not being GC leader, Movistar prioritizing stages.
UAE's DE LA CRUZ attacked from 13th GC on penultimate climb, teams outside top-10 gambling early.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: won stage day after crash, demonstrating superior recovery and explosive power on extreme gradients
rider_signals.MASS Enric: positive: matched ROGLIC until final 500m on wall, Movistar committing full team support suggests GC priority shift
rider_signals.NIELSEN Magnus: negative: caught in final kilometer after 16km solo effort, misjudged effort distribution for variable gradient finish
rider_signals.VAN BAAL Dylan: positive: pulled MASS through final 4km despite not being team leader, unusual domestique strength late in stage
rider_signals.EIKE Odd Christian: neutral: retained red jersey but gained no time, passive racing suggests defending not attacking posture
